issues.title: GNOME Settings Daemons Repeatedly Failing
issues.notes: Created keepalive timer to auto-restart gsd-media-keys and gsd-power

issues.title: Laptop Speaker Audio Quality Worse Than Windows
issues.notes: Captured Windows Dolby impulse response and applied via convolution. Should closely match Windows.

issues.title: WirePlumber Crashes Due to Broken Lua Script
Yoga Pro 9 Subwoofer Disabled by Default
issues.notes: Subwoofer disabled due to kernel bug. Enabled via I2C bypass script from GitHub repo.

issues.title: TAS2781 Kernel Driver Resets I2C Configuration
issues.notes: Driver snd_hda_scodec_tas2781_i2c was resetting I2C config. Blacklisted in /etc/modprobe.d/

issues.title: GSD Daemons Fail After Reboot Due to Missing DISPLAY
issues.notes: Systemd service lacked DISPLAY=:0 environment variable. Added Environment=DISPLAY=:0 to gsd-keepalive.service

issues.title: Files and Terminal Apps Not Opening
issues.notes: xdg-desktop-portal-gnome crashes with SEGFAULT. Fixed by using GTK portal, D-Bus service overrides, and autostart script.

issues.title: Vibe-Typer & LibreOffice: Audio Renderer Timeout + Portal Service Crash
issues.notes: Two related issues: (1) vibe-typer times out waiting for audio renderer (PipeWire ALSA error 'Invalid argument'), (2) LibreOffice won't open (xdg-desktop-portal service crashed and not recovering). Both may be related to audio system changes or 3+ day uptime without reboot.

active_services.name: fix-portal-services.desktop
active_services.purpose: Autostart portal and terminal services with DISPLAY

active_services.name: yoga-16imh9-speakers.service
active_services.purpose: Enable subwoofer via I2C bypass script

active_services.name: easyeffects
active_services.purpose: Audio enhancement for Yoga Pro 9 speakers

blacklisted_drivers.reason: Resets I2C configuration set by bypass script

active_requests.title: Improve Laptop Speaker Audio Quality
active_requests.notes: Initial attempt with EasyEffects presets and Dolby IR capture. Superseded by REQ_002.

active_requests.title: Fix Yoga Pro 9 Subwoofer/Speaker Quality
active_requests.notes: Subwoofer was disabled by default. Enabled via I2C bypass script + driver blacklist. Sound much fuller.

active_requests.title: Vibe-Typer Audio & LibreOffice Portal Issues
active_requests.notes: Vibe-typer FIXED by reboot (audio renderer timeout resolved). LibreOffice and portal still broken - regex caused by autostart script not running early enough at boot. Manual fix script execution restores functionality.

active_requests.title: Portal Service Regression After Reboot
active_requests.notes: xdg-desktop-portal crashes at boot before autostart fix script runs. Autostart delay=5s is too late (portal crashes at +6s). Manual fix script workaround works. Need systemd service to run earlier.
